headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -43.3)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 1% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations remain dominant with 128 quotes despite dropping from yesterday's peak, with an overwhelming 96 strong-intensity quotes driving continued high scores.
• All categories show below-average activity levels compared to their 134-day ranges, with optimism particularly subdued at -37.4.
• Fears dropped significantly from yesterday while frustrations cooled but optimism declined further, suggesting mixed emotional momentum.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
